title: indigofera clitorioides
intro: Indigofera clitorioides, also known as the False Tick Trefoil, is a perennial plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Indigofera clitorioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
